title: dragon egg craft
description: Adds ability to duplicate dragon egg
body:
**Dragon Egg Craft**

This data pack introduces a new crafting recipe to Minecraft, allowing players to duplicate Dragon Eggs. With this data pack installed, you can craft two Dragon Eggs using 1 Dragon Egg, 4 Iron Ingots, 2 Gold Ingots and 2 diamonds.

**Crafting Recipe:** To craft 2 Dragon Eggs, you need:

*   4 Iron Ingots
*   2 Gold Ingots
*   2 Diamonds
*   1 Dragon Egg

**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1101093/description_2f741c23-06f0-4e5f-97a8-c49002c24467.png)**

 

**Notes:**

*   **Be careful with the duplication of Dragon Eggs in survival mode, as they are a rare item and their duplication can alter game balance.**
*   **Ensure that you use the crafted Dragon Eggs responsibly in your gameplay to maintain the challenge and excitement of the game.**
